UserComments.Comment: E.On has discontinued roaming agreement with EVN,thus E.On Drive RFID card no longer worx for EVN charging stations.

Do not exceed 3hrs. of continuous charging to avoid extra fees, to fully charge Your battery restart charging every 3hrs.. Excellent charging hub:Just few steps from Your vehicle docked @ this charging station: Best restaurant, I ever visited with best Vegan menu-Donau Cafe,public toilet free of charge, playground, public water tap,boat port with boat-trips available in july & august. UsageCost: Extra fee for exceeding 3hrs. of continuous charging. To fully charge your battery restart charging every 3hrs. to avoid extra fees.
